entries.reason: M412 new boss art — Void Scholar previously had no graphic in the Scholar's Sanctum encounter. Five-pose set generated with shared reference for identity lock.
entries.prompt: Pixel art portrait bust of The Void Scholar — gaunt mid-50s sage with white-glowing violet eyes, silver-white hair in a small knot, cracked obsidian academic robe with violet runes, chained books, void-mist.

entries.reason: M412 new boss art — south idle pose, generated with portrait as reference for identity lock.
entries.prompt: Void Scholar south idle, full body, calm, hands loose in front, robe to ankle.

entries.reason: M412 new boss art — east idle pose.
entries.prompt: Void Scholar east idle, three-quarter side view, calm, robe to ankle, books on chest.

entries.reason: M412 new boss art — east attack pose, hurling a void-orb.
entries.prompt: Void Scholar mid-cast: right arm thrust forward hurling a violet-black void-orb, left hand pulled back glowing with rune.

entries.reason: M412 new boss art — defeated KO pose.
entries.prompt: Void Scholar collapsed on ground facing east, robe sprawled, eyes closed, void-mist dispersed.
